title: Evals Are Broken, Use Them Anyway — Ara Khan, Cline
summary: Ara Khan argues that AI benchmarks are unreliable but necessary, and proposes a practical framework for analyzing benchmark failures across three zones: obvious bugs, nuanced improvements specific to your setup, and overfitting risk. He demonstrates through Cline's Terminal Bench improvement that gains often come from environment tuning and prompt engineering rather than model selection.
